ipconfig.description: Displays network configuration information such as IP addresses and adapters.

ip addr.description: Shows IP addresses and network interfaces on Linux.

dir.description: Lists files and folders in the current directory.

cd.description: Displays or changes the current directory.

copy.description: Copies files from one location to another.

mv.description: Moves or renames files and directories.

ps aux.description: Shows detailed information about running processes.

Compress-Archive.description: Creates a ZIP archive in PowerShell.

zip -r.description: Recursively compresses a folder into a ZIP archive.
